action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 4 achieved test spearman=0.6212 using mean-pooled ESM2 regional embeddings (positions 561-588) + linear regression. Val_spr was 0.82, showing a generalization gap to combinatorial test mutants. Analysis: Mean pooling discards positional information within the 28-AA region and provides no explicit sequence-likelihood signal. Adding ESM2's own log-likelihood of the observed amino acids in the variable region as an extra feature should supply a strong zero-shot evolutionary signal that often correlates with fitness and complements the embedding representation. This is a minimal, fast-to-compute change. Decision: Update train.py and predict.py to extract both mean embeddings and per-region mean log-probabilities from ESM2 layer 30, train a linear regressor on the combined 641-dim feature, and submit eval.
